description_long: This is a large, weathered wooden storage crate with reinforced diagonal planks on each side, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The wood is aged, with visible grain, knots, and some discoloration, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. Three sides of the box display prominent hazard warning signs: one side has a flammable solid placard, another features a high voltage warning, and a third displays a radioactive material warning, all of which are highly visible and suggest the crate is used for transporting or storing dangerous materials. The top of the box is flat and constructed from the same wooden planks, with no visible hinges or handles. There are no visible openings, locks, or access points, indicating the box is likely sealed or nailed shut. The overall construction and signage imply it is intended for secure storage in industrial, urban, or hazardous environments.
description: A large, weathered wooden crate with reinforced planks and multiple hazard warning signs, designed for secure storage of dangerous materials.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain wooden side with diagonal reinforcement, no visible signage or labels.
description_view_1: This side features a flammable solid warning placard with a flame icon and striped background.
description_view_2: This view displays a high voltage warning sign with a yellow triangle and black lightning bolt.
description_view_3: This side has a radioactive warning placard with a yellow triangle and radiation symbol.
